_metadata.source: Google web search (levi.com page titles and product descriptions)
_metadata.method: WebSearch for 'site:levi.com [product_code]' and cross-references with Levi's regional sites (GB, NL, IT, GR, PL, ES) and retailers (Amazon, Macy's). Color names extracted from page titles following Levi's 'Product - COLOR | Levi's US' pattern. Where specific Levi's color name was found in search snippet, it is included before the wash category.
_metadata.notes: 3 codes could not be resolved (125010382, 188830294, 196260654) - likely discontinued or never indexed. For these, wash category is inferred from neighboring codes in the same style family.
